summary: Iteration 54: CM Communication Hub & Client Messages Fix - All tests passed. Backend: 12/12 tests passed. Frontend: All 5 features verified working. The messaging fix successfully resolves the reported issues.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 54 tested the CM Communication Hub and Client Messages fix. All features working: (1) CM Communication Hub shows 8 clients with names, case IDs, products in WhatsApp-style layout, (2) Chat history visible with sent/received messages, (3) Client Messages shows same conversation as CM, (4) Two-way sync working - CM sends to client and client sends to CM, (5) Backend my-cases-summary returns client_name and client_email from users collection.

cm_communication_hub.details: Left panel shows 8 clients with names (Jane Smith, TEST_Sale_Client, etc.), case IDs (LEAMSS-2024-0001), and products (Canada PR). WhatsApp-style layout with green CM bubbles and gray client bubbles.

chat_history_visible.details: After selecting Jane Smith, 13+ messages visible including both CM (green) and client (gray) messages with timestamps.

client_messages.details: Client sees LEAMSS-2024-0001 conversation with SAME messages as CM. WhatsApp-style layout with green client bubbles and gray CM bubbles.

two_way_sync.details: CM sends via Communication Hub -> Client sees in Messages. Client sends via Messages -> CM sees in Communication Hub. Verified with Playwright tests.

backend_my_cases_summary.details: GET /api/cm-tools/my-cases-summary returns client_name and client_email from users collection lookup. All 8 cases have populated client names.

mocked_apis.resend_email: MOCK mode - logs to console instead of sending actual emails (no RESEND_API_KEY configured)

original_issues_fixed.issue_1: CM Communication Hub showed empty dropdown - FIXED: CommunicationHub.jsx now self-loads cases with client names via my-cases-summary endpoint
original_issues_fixed.issue_2: Communication Hub and Messages showed different chats - FIXED: Both now use cm_client_messages collection for unified chat
